title: EQ - Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time
scenario: Verify that EQ setting changes (presets and custom sliders) are heard in real time while music is playing.
steps: 2) Start the app with a device that supports EQ.
3) Go to Device Settings and tap on the EQ tab.
4) Change between Bass, Flat, and Bright settings — changes in the music should be noticeable.
5) Switch to Custom EQ and move sliders around — changes in music should be noticeable (user must release the slider for changes to take effect).
expected: Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time.
